title: Structural Rewrite Phase 4 Closeout Tracking Refresh Boundary Migration
subject: planning.structural_rewrite_program
summary: Records the completed bounded Phase 4 closeout-tracking refresh-boundary slice by routing InitiativeCloseoutService through one private closeout-local boundary for the remaining tracker outputs after the approved shared closeout seam while preserving the explicit closeout result contract.
notes: This transition preserves traceability as the pre-seam canonical write, keeps the approved shared closeout seam fixed to the five shared outputs, routes only the three remaining tracker outputs through one private closeout-local boundary, leaves the public tracker sync family names and current mutation callers unchanged, and stops at a dedicated outcome-review task before any later checkpoint opens.
